headline: Oracle’s Expanding Defense AI Role And What It Could Mean For Investors
summary: Oracle (NYSE:ORCL) expanded AI-focused defense partnerships with the U.S. Department of Defense, including support for secure, classified AI workloads. The company secured a multi year contract with the U.S. Air Force valued at $88 million for cloud modernization through 2028. These agreements cover agentic AI systems for military decision support and classified cloud infrastructure across U.S. national security operations.
